[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,

    "Precondition": "Both arms have free frontal access to the left (darker) box; there are no objects directly in front of or to the sides of the darker box. The cup is in front of the right box and does not obstruct either arm’s path to the darker box.",

  }

parsed_json.Precondition: Both arms have free frontal access to the left (darker) box; there are no objects directly in front of or to the sides of the darker box. The cup is in front of the right box and does not obstruct either arm’s path to the darker box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is securely held between both end-effectors and lifted a few centimeters above the tabletop, completing the pick-up.
